summary: ScreenOdds has a starter Oscars sentiment snapshot, but the next live scan should refresh X chatter around Best Picture markets, Kalshi Oscars series volume, and early awards-season narratives.
topNarratives: Best Picture market sentiment is usually weak before nominations narrow the field.
Kalshi has active public Oscars series that can provide comparison-market context.
Festival reactions, guild signals, and critic awards should be weighted above early social confidence.
